knowledge_base.title: Reset your password
knowledge_base.content: To reset your password, go to Settings > Security and click 'Reset password'. You will receive an email with a reset link valid for 30 minutes.

knowledge_base.title: Request a refund
knowledge_base.content: Refunds can be requested within 30 days of purchase from Billing > Orders. Refunds are processed to the original payment method within 5-7 business days.

knowledge_base.title: Update billing information
knowledge_base.content: Update your card or billing address under Billing > Payment Methods. Changes apply to your next invoice.

knowledge_base.title: Two-factor authentication
knowledge_base.content: Enable 2FA in Settings > Security. We support authenticator apps and SMS codes.

sample_tickets.subject: Can't log in after password reset
sample_tickets.description: I reset my password but the new one is not accepted.
